sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111239" key="filokoni/mwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-κονίμων</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῑ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">κόνις</etym>) <sense id="n111239.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fond of rolling in the dust,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:45" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45</biblScope> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φοινικείμονας</foreign> cj. Porson).</sense> </entryFree>
